titles.text: Twin Series Vol. 5: Wan-wan Meitantei EX + Mahou no Kuni no Cake-ya-san Monogatari
ツインシリーズ Vol.5 魔法の国のケーキ屋さん物語 + わんわん名探偵EX

descriptions.text: Twin Series Vol. 5: Wan Wan Meitantei EX/Mahou no Kuni no Keaki-Okusan Monogatari is a Miscellaneous game, developed and published by Culture Brain, which was released in Japan in 2004.
